note: Cut-splice pivot: partition the pentamer into 2-3 covalent pieces (all positions defined). R146=copy-pos143, WalkerA=21-28 (copy_start_res=4). Fold all chains of a scheme together; score every subunit's R146 vs its DESIGNED neighbour (covalent within a piece, co-assembly at seams).

sA_trimer_plus_dimer.desc: 2 groups (3+2): trimer seats1-2-3 + dimer seats4-5; 2 free seams (3->4, 5->1)

sB_dimer_dimer_monomer.desc: 3 groups (2+2+1): dimer s1-2 + dimer s3-4 + monomer s5; 3 free seams
